action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 9 debug script confirmed the fixed DINOv2 model loads the checkpoint without shape mismatch and produces correct output shape. Analysis: The eval failure in iter 8 was solely due to Dinov2Config defaulting to 224x224 when pretrained=False. The explicit image_size=518/patch_size=14 fix resolves this. Decision: Submit the existing best checkpoint for evaluation immediately to obtain the DINOv2 Quickdraw baseline and measure end-to-end eval time. This unblocks scaling decisions for the remaining ~9.5h and 21 iterations.
